name: EuiInlineEditTitle

aria-label.description:
Defines a string value that labels the current element.
@see aria-labelledby.

onSave.description:
Callback that fires when a user clicks the save button.
Passes the current edited text value as an argument.

To validate the value of the edited text, pass back a boolean flag.
If `false`, EuiInlineEdit will remain in edit mode, where loading or invalid states can be set.
If `true`, EuiInlineEdit will return to read mode.

inputAriaLabel.description:
Form label that appears above the form control.
This is required for accessibility because there is no visual label on the input.

startWithEditOpen.description: Starts the component in edit mode

readModeProps.description: Props that will be applied directly to the `EuiEmptyButton` displayed in read mode

editModeProps.type: { formRowProps?: Partial<(DisambiguateSet<LabelProps, LegendProps> & { labelType?: "legend"; } & CommonProps & { display?: "center" | "row" | "columnCompressed" | "centerCompressed" | "rowCompressed"; ... 11 more ...; isDisabled?: boolean; } & Omit<...>) | (DisambiguateSet<...> & ... 3 more ... & HTMLAttributes<...>...
editModeProps.description:
Multiple props objects that can be applied directly to various child components displayed in edit mode.
- `formRowProps` will be passed to `EuiFormRow`
- `inputProps` will be passed to `EuiFieldText`
- `saveButtonProps` & `cancelButtonProps` will be passed to their respective `EuiButtonIcon`s

isLoading.description: Loading state - only displayed in edit mode

isInvalid.description: Invalid state - only displayed edit mode

isReadOnly.description: Locks inline edit in read mode and displays the text value

value.description: To use inline edit as a controlled component, continuously pass the value via this prop

onCancel.description: Callback required to reset `value` to the previous read mode text value.

heading.description:
Level of heading to be used for the title.
Use `span` for text that is not semantically a heading, but should still visually appear as a title.

example: <EuiInlineEditTitle size="m" heading="h1" defaultValue="Hello World!" inputAriaLabel="Edit title inline" />
